title: WafFirewall
description: A WAF firewall instance associated with a Fastly service.

id.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the WAF firewall.

service_id.description: The ID of the associated service.

active_rules_fastly_block_count.description: The number of active rules in block mode managed by Fastly.

active_rules_fastly_log_count.description: The number of active rules in log mode managed by Fastly.

active_rules_owasp_block_count.description: The number of active OWASP rules in block mode.

active_rules_owasp_log_count.description: The number of active OWASP rules in log mode.

created_at.description: The date and time the firewall was created.

updated_at.description: The date and time the firewall was last updated.
